steps.observed: Results loaded with RECOMMENDED badge visible

steps.expected: Flat label style (no thick border, no box-like padding)
steps.observed: borderWidth: '0px 0px 2px' (only bottom underline, no box border), padding: '0px', className: 'result-recommendation winner'

steps.action: Switch to Curve tab to see ALTERNATIVE badge
steps.expected: ALTERNATIVE badge visible with flat style

assertions.title: Approve and Swap shown as step indicators

steps.action: View Spandex result for USDC->WETH (approval required)
steps.expected: Both Approve and Swap shown as numbered steps
steps.observed: Step container .tx-steps shows: '1.' + Approve button, '2.' + Swap button (disabled). Step classes: tx-step-num '1.', tx-step, tx-step-num '2.', tx-step. Swap is step-disabled before approval.

assertions.title: Approved step shows checkmark when done

steps.action: Inject mock wallet with eth_sendTransaction and eth_getTransactionReceipt support
Click Approve button on Spandex result card
steps.observed: tx returned mock hash, receipt returned status: 0x1 (success)

steps.action: Check Approve button state after approval
steps.expected: Approve shows checkmark/done indicator and is disabled
steps.observed: Approve button text: 'Approved ✓', class: 'tx-btn approve-btn approved', disabled: true
Swap button class: 'tx-btn swap-btn' (no disabled class), disabled: false, cursor: pointer. Button is now the active primary action.

steps.action: Switch to Curve tab (Curve does not require approval)
steps.expected: Only Swap button shown, no numbered step indicators
steps.observed: Curve result shows only button 'Swap' in a .tx-steps container. No '1.' or '2.' numbering. No Approve button. The .tx-steps container has only the Swap button, confirming no step indicator.

steps.action: Clear From Token field, type 'USDC', click autocomplete item
steps.expected: USDC selected via autocomplete with full address
steps.observed: From Token field shows USDC with full 42-char contract address in parentheses

steps.expected: Slippage updates to 100, button becomes active
steps.observed: Slippage input changed to '100', button '100' got [active] state

steps.expected: Form submits, results appear with flat badges
steps.observed: URL: ...chainId=8453&from=0x833589...&to=0x420000...&amount=1000&slippageBps=100. Results show RECOMMENDED flat badge (underline only, no box). Step indicator visible: 1. Approve, 2. Swap.

steps.action: Navigate to Ethereum USDC/WETH compare without connecting wallet
steps.observed: Results loaded. Approve button: class 'tx-btn approve-btn wallet-required', opacity: 0.4, cursor: not-allowed, aria-disabled: true. Swap button: [disabled].
Click triggered: walletMsgText: 'Connect wallet first', txStatusText: 'Connect wallet first', txStatusClass: 'tx-status error'. 'FAILED: CONNECT WALLET FIRST' shown in red box below buttons.

frictions.description: Auto-refresh (15s timer) caused result card to re-render mid-test, invalidating DOM element refs. Had to re-snapshot after auto-refresh.
frictions.resolution: Paused auto-refresh via clearInterval(window._refreshTimer) before interactive tests like approve click

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. RECOMMENDED and ALTERNATIVE badges are flat labels (borderWidth: 0px 0px 2px, no box/button styling). Approve/Swap step indicator shows numbered sequential steps when approval required. After mock approval, Approve shows 'Approved ✓' (disabled). Swap becomes active/enabled after approval. Curve result (no approval) shows only Swap with no step numbering. Full form-to-results flow works with autocomplete + preset + flat badges. Transaction buttons greyed with wallet-required indication when no wallet connected.
